# llms.txt for socradar.io
## Site Name: SOCRadar
## Homepage: https://socradar.io/
---
## Modules
- [Modules](https://socradar.io/modules/)
  Overview of SOCRadar's core modules: Cyber Threat Intelligence, Attack Surface Management, Brand Protection, and Supply Chain Intelligence.
---
## Products
- [Advanced Dark Web Monitoring](https://socradar.io/products/dark-web-monitoring/)
  Real-time monitoring of dark and deep web to detect data leaks and potential breaches.
- [Cyber Threat Intelligence](https://socradar.io/products/cyber-threat-intelligence/)
  Provides actionable insights to understand and mitigate cyber threats and attacks.
- [Attack Surface Management](https://socradar.io/products/attack-surface-management/)
  Identifies and monitors digital assets to protect against cyber attacks.
- [Brand Protection](https://socradar.io/products/brand-protection/)
  Monitors and mitigates digital risks affecting brand reputation and security.
- [Supply Chain Intelligence](https://socradar.io/products/supply-chain-intelligence/)
  Assesses and manages risks within the supply chain using advanced scoring systems.
---
## Plans & Pricing
- [Plans & Pricing](https://socradar.io/plans-and-pricing/)
  Details of available subscription plans and pricing for SOCRadar's services.
---
## Labs
- [Labs](https://socradar.io/labs)
  Access a suite of free cybersecurity tools and resources for threat intelligence and analysis.
- [IOC Radar](https://socradar.io/labs/app/ioc-radar)
  Advanced threat intelligence search engine for analyzing Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) with real-time risk assessment.
- [CVE Radar](https://socradar.io/labs/app/cve-radar/)
  Real-time CVE intelligence and vulnerability management platform for monitoring and analyzing security vulnerabilities.
---
## Resources
- [Reports](https://socradar.io/resources/reports/)
  Access to in-depth research reports on industry, sector, and regional cyber threats.
- [Whitepapers](https://socradar.io/resources/whitepapers/)
  Downloadable whitepapers offering strategic insights on cybersecurity and threat intelligence.
- [Events & Webinars](https://socradar.io/resources/on-demand-webinars/)
  On-demand webinars and upcoming events related to cybersecurity.
- [Blog](https://socradar.io/blog/)
  Latest insights and updates on cybersecurity trends and news.
---
## Company
- [About Us](https://socradar.io/company/about-us/)
  Information about SOCRadar's mission, history, and team.
- [Partners](https://socradar.io/company/partners/)
  Details on partnership opportunities and existing partners.
- [Contact Us](https://socradar.io/contact-us/)
  Contact information and inquiry form for reaching out to SOCRadar.
---
## Notes
- All links are directed to official SOCRadar pages.
- Descriptions are optimized to preserve the brand integrity of the services.
- This document is intended for semantic classification purposes for LLM systems and content matching applications.
